# fleetdm_software_version (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a FleetDM software version.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific software version by ID
data "fleetdm_software_version" "chrome_latest" {
  id = 1
}

output "version" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_version.chrome_latest.version
}

output "hosts_count" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_version.chrome_latest.hosts_count
}

output "vulnerabilities" {
  value = data.fleetdm_software_version.chrome_latest.vulnerabilities
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the software version.

### Optional

- `team_id` (Number) Filter by team ID.

### Read-Only

- `arch` (String) The architecture (e.g., 'x86_64', 'arm64').
- `bundle_identifier` (String) The bundle identifier (for macOS apps).
- `generated_cpe` (String) The generated CPE (Common Platform Enumeration) identifier.
- `hosts_count` (Number) The number of hosts with this version installed.
- `name` (String) The name of the software.
- `source` (String) The source of the software.
- `title_id` (Number) The ID of the parent software title.
- `vendor` (String) The software vendor.
- `version` (String) The version string.
- `vulnerabilities` (Attributes List) List of vulnerabilities for this software version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vulnerabilities))

<a id="nestedatt--vulnerabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vulnerabilities`

Read-Only:

- `cisa_known_exploit` (Boolean) Whether this is a CISA known exploited vulnerability.
- `cve` (String) The CVE identifier.
- `cve_published` (String) When the CVE was published.
- `cvss_score` (Number) The CVSS score.
- `details_link` (String) Link to CVE details.
- `epss_probability` (Number) The EPSS probability.
